summary: The CI job failed because one test timed out, causing the test suite to report 1 failure and Make to exit non‑zero.
root_cause: A test timed out: the test harness reported "[FAILED] Timed out after 1.001s.", resulting in 1 failed test and make exiting with an error.

evidence.reason: Explicit message from the test harness indicating a timeout that caused a failure.
Shows a failing test run (ANSI-colored '[FAILED]' marker) immediately before the timeout message.
Summarizes that the test suite ended with 1 failed test, matching the timeout failure.
Make returned a non-zero exit due to the failing test target, causing the CI job to fail.

suggested_fix: Re-run the tests with verbose output to capture which test timed out; increase the test timeout or fix the hung test. After identifying the failing test (enable more detailed logs or run subsets), either adjust the harness timeout or modify the test to complete within the expected time, then re-run CI.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-11 F2 fix the shim didn't persist model_info into rows. This entry was backfilled from known run-time env: CILOGBENCH_OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-5-mini, default base_url, default max_completion_tokens=4096. resolved_model and system_fingerprint are not recoverable from the original API responses.
